title: Droid's Create Skyblock Modpack
description: A Unique Skyblock Experience with Create Mod.
body:
Welcome to Droid's Create Skyblock Modpack, where you can play skyblock with the create mod. Unlike other modpacks, this modpack focus only on the create mod. To create a unqiue style, this modpack contains Droid's Create Superflat and Skyblock Crates, another mod I made to make obtaining items in Skyblock special and possible.

Video Showcase: Soon

This modpack is currently for singleplayer, so you may need to seperate the mods individually for server and client if you plan to host a server on this modpack.

RAM:
- At least 4GB, but 8GB recommended
